title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Rapido - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Rapido - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Rapido invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rapido:
Rapido is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rapido!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
